_publications._publicationTitle: Effects of Neurod1 Expression on Mouse and Human Schwannoma Cells.

_contextSnippet: the percentage of EdU positive cells in Nf2cKO+ND1 group was significantly reduced (p<0.05)
details: Successfully detected proliferation in vestibular ganglia showing nodules of EdU-positive cells, with percentage of EdU positive cells significantly reduced in Nf2cKO+ND1 group after sciatic nerve axotomy (p<0.05)
